name: chr15q26_subtelomeric_variable
description: Chromosome 15 q-arm subtelomeric region (15q26), containing a variable mosaic of subterminal repeats, degenerate (TTAGGG)n stretches, and segmental duplications shared with other subtelomeres. Site of recurrent 15q26 microdeletions (IGF1R locus) presenting with intrauterine growth restriction.

architecture.internal_structure: Subterminal mosaic of subtelomeric repeats shared across multiple chromosome ends, TAR1 family, degenerate telomere repeats, and small SDs; ends in canonical TTAGGG telomere.
